form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Class 5 H on April 10 over 520m at this track behind Opawa Hass beaten 6 lengths (30.38). Prepared to risk this time.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Manawatu over 457m in 25.92 last start, beating Big Time Tama. Excellent record from this draw, including three wins. Winning hope with the right run.
